summary: GIS Developer with demonstrated expertise in architecting custom web mapping applications, automating spatial data processing, and optimizing geospatial databases. Proficient in Python, PostGIS, JavaScript, and modern front-end mapping libraries . Delivers scalable, cloud-native GIS solutions that transform complex spatial data into actionable intelligence for enterprise decision-making. Committed to clean code, system performance, and cross-functional collaboration.

workExperiences.description:
Digitized 50+ historical maps; built interactive web maps with Python.
Managed spatial databases in PostgreSQL; improved query efficiency by ~30%.
Analyzed satellite imagery for a land cover pilot project.
Managed a spatial database with 50 million building footprints using PostGIS/GeoPandas.
Optimized spatial joins from 45 minutes to 18 seconds by implementing spatial indexing (Quadtree/STR-tree).
Handled multi-temporal satellite imagery datasets exceeding 200,000 x 200,000 pixels (40 GPixels).

workExperiences.company: Resource Center for Resource Mapping &Development(RCMRD)                                                                            Nairobi
workExperiences.description:
Processed and cleaned 50+ GB of raw geospatial data (LiDAR, satellite imagery, vector files) for enterprise GIS.
Converted and transformed 10+ disparate spatial datasets into a centralized geodatabase, reducing query time by 30%
Automated data extraction workflows using Python/ArcPy, cutting manual processing time by 15 hours/week.
Managed 1,000+ versioned feature classes in an enterprise SDE environment with 99.9% data integrity.
Developed 5 predictive habitat suitability models using MaxEnt and raster analysis, achieving 85% accuracy against field observations.
Performed hydrologic modeling for 500+ km² watershed, identifying 15 high-risk flood zones.
Designed and published 20+ interactive web maps using ArcGIS Online/Leaflet

educations.eduDescription: Focused on spatial data acquisition, GIS analysis, remote sensing, and digital cartography — combining technical proficiency in geospatial software and programming with applied problem-solving in environmental and urban systems.

certifications.certName: ASPRS GIS/LIS Certification (from American Society for Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing)
Esri ArcGIS Developer Certification - from Esri)

projects.projectDescription: Interactive geospatial platform visualizing real-time remittance flows from 6 global regions to Kenya. Built with Leaflet, Turf.js, and Mavo CMS.
Open-source, Mavo-powered resume template with GitHub bagjjfjfbcbckend, PDF export, and schema.org markup for ATS compatibility.
Time-series analysis and machine learning model to predict diaspora remittance inflows using macroeconomic indicators.
